title: Blahaj Totem (Trans)
description: A variation to my original project, which replaces the Totem of Undying with a silly little trans shark.
body:
Replaces the Totem of Undying with everyone's favorite silly little guy!

Installation:
- Download the version of your choice
- Find your resource pack folder in .minecraft
- Drop it in there :3
- omg there's my boy
